name: the catalog records each tool's own native option vocabulary (ruff tool.ruff.lint keys, rubocop Cop/Option, eslint rule arrays) rather than a transformed CTP abstraction
command: ruby -ryaml -e 't=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; ok = t["ruff"]["option_form"].include?("tool.ruff.lint") && t["rubocop"]["option_form"].include?("Option") && t["eslint"]["examples"]["complexity"]; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo options-are-tool-native 1>&2
